name: image_load_dll_rstrtmgr_suspicious_load
raw_query: any where (file.path:"*\\RstrtMgr.dll" or file.pe.original_file_name:"RstrtMgr.dll") and ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*")) or ((process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Contacts\\*")))
